name: Jellystream
description: AceStream integration for Jellyfin with Fire TV-first playback.
overview: AceStream Live TV bridge for Jellyfin

versions.changelog: Add per-playlist stream mode with Direct AceStream URL, Redirect and Proxy options so Jellystream Live TV can avoid plugin proxying without changing global Jellyfin playback settings.
Add Jellyfin dashboard configuration page for AceStream URLs, Fire TV mode, stream proxying and inline M3U.
Initial Fire TV-first MVP with M3U, healthcheck and proxied stream endpoints.
